item.title: MEME DUMP WITHOUT POLITICS OR BOTS VOL 77
item.description:
"The hopeless don't revolt, because revolution is an act of hope." ― Pyotr Kropotkin Track of this dump: Recloose feat. Joe Dukie – Dust https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ajg7tNE9rdg I’ve been informed that some people don’t like me posting Spotify links to the tracks on these dumps, because apparently Spotify is eviler than YouTube due to Joe Rogan. Imgur baffles me sometimes, honestly. But sure, from now on if the songs are available on yt I’ll post that link instead. Vol 76 found here: https://imgur.com/gallery/meme-dump-without-politics-bots-vol-76-1uPYmpm
Art: Rob W Jones.
Art: Wayan Bayu.
From the actual Japanese tv series Kamen Rider X, ep 26 named "Underworld's Dictator, Starfish Hitler!!" (1974).

item.title: See what happens when you put a socialist in charge?
item.description:
https://thedeepdive.ca/mexicos-president-sheinbaum-decrees-universal-healthcare-for-120-million/
Put socialists in charge and even poor countries can get universal healthcare. Put liberals in charge… and you might wind up with the ACA, which they use as a cudgel to beat their voters with anytime they ask for more like Hillary and Biden did…

item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description:
"do you think it'll work?" "It would take a miracle. WAKA WAKA!!!"
I automatically assumed this guy was British. Where do you even find peas in the US?
All cops!
I have no words to describe how angry I am
"That's all folks!"
item.dc:creator: stonetemplefox05

item.title: My posts have been going viral - I was able to become an independent artist!
item.description:
I was in professional galleries for 10 years but after a few posts went viral I was able to go independent and self-represent my artwork. I just took back possession of my drawings! I'm so grateful to you for all of your support! Below are some of my drawings that I'm now able to sell to collectors directly.
Cat Tax! ^My cat Mabel You can see some of my available prints here - https://emilycopeland.com/prints/ Have an incredible day!
item.dc:creator: emilycopelandartistry

item.title: And so it begins...
item.description: https://www.newsweek.com/france-pulls-all-gold-out-of-us-federal-reserve-11792591 I'm guessing Germany and the UK won't, but other countries will follow suit. It's coming: https://fortune.com/2026/03/23/us-government-insolvent-fiscal-crisis-fix/ You might want to buy some canned food and ramen noodles to stash away, just in case.

item.title: History has a tendency to repeat itself and President Trump is about to make the same mistake with Iran that his own father made some 80 years ago and that is NOT PULLING OUT. #memes #donaldtrump #maga #usapolitics #usareels
item.dc:creator: pjarmala198110

item.title: Dump vol 660 Feelings edition 3
item.description:
A collection of words, art, and images that make me feel very deeply
Edition 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/dump-vol-419-beautiful-lnloF4X Edition 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/memes-vol-579-weeping-IyBHJw2
I’d go past this sign on my way home from work and on particularly sensitive days it would make me cry. The people who live here just took it down and I hope it was their choice and somebody didn’t vandalize it
I’ve been so extremely depressed and anxious lately with the state of the world and my job that I need to focus on something positive resulting in this post. It’s not all positive but it all makes me feel things
I miss Scrump and Paulie so much I could choke
I NEED to take this to heart but I constantly worry that everybody who loves me is going to die
I relate to this so insanely hard and if any of you do too please don’t give up. I’m meeting with all my friends on Saturday. I work with one of my favorite people in the whole world and I get to see her on the weekends and she brings me innumerable joy. I got to go shopping last week with my coworker for weed and makeup. Please don’t give up on finding human connection. PLEASE don’t turn to an AI to find someone to talk to- for the love of god go outside and talk to the trees! Just try! I never thought I’d find a group and now I have and I’m better because of it
I think of everybody who has even been my best friend. Mia, I miss playing wolves with you everyday. I miss pretending to be Artemis. I miss pretending to be Kissin Kate Barlow. I miss you.
I love my kittens. Gertie makes this little chirrup sound every time she jumps off of something and my heart swells. I’m so glad Scrump sent her my way. Bruce lays with me every single time I sit on my bed. I love them so much
And Nessie has been with me through some of the toughest times of my life. I’m grateful to her
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: Republicans are sex trafficking child rapers, and Republican voters support these child rapists
